verses.latin_vulgate: Cum invocarem exaudivit me Deus justitiæ meæ,  in tribulatione dilatasti mihi.  Miserere mei, et exaudi orationem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּקׇרְאִ֡י עֲנֵ֤נִי ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י צִדְקִ֗י בַּ֭צָּר הִרְחַ֣בְתָּ לִּ֑י חׇ֝נֵּ֗נִי וּשְׁמַ֥ע תְּפִלָּתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: When I called upon him, the God of my justice heard me: when I was in distress, thou hast enlarged me. Have mercy on me: and hear my prayer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi, edelläveisaajalle, kanteleilla. (H 4:2) Rukoillessani kuule minua, vanhurskauteni Jumala, joka minua lohdutat ahdistuksessani: ole minulle armollinen, ja kuule rukoukseni.
verses.king_james: Hear me when I call, O God of my righteousness: thou hast enlarged me when I was in distress; have mercy upon me, and hear my prayer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii hominum, usquequo gravi corde ?  ut quid diligitis vanitatem, et quæritis mendacium ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י אִ֡ישׁ עַד־מֶ֬ה כְבוֹדִ֣י לִ֭כְלִמָּה תֶּאֱהָב֣וּן רִ֑יק תְּבַקְשׁ֖וּ כָזָ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: O ye sons of men, how long will you be dull of heart? why do you love vanity, and seek after lying?
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 4:3) Te uljaat miehet, kuinka kauvan pitää minun kunniani pilkattaman? miksi te rakastatte turhuutta ja kysytte valhetta? Sela!
verses.king_james: O ye sons of men, how long will ye turn my glory into shame? how long will ye love vanity, and seek after leasing? Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et scitote quoniam mirificavit Dominus sanctum suum ;  Dominus exaudiet me cum clamavero ad eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּדְע֗וּ כִּֽי־הִפְלָ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה חָסִ֣יד ל֑וֹ יְהֹוָ֥ה יִ֝שְׁמַ֗ע בְּקׇרְאִ֥י אֵלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Know ye also that the Lord hath made his holy one wonderful: the Lord will hear me when I shall cry unto him.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 4:4) Niin tuntekaat, että Herra vie pyhänsä ihmeellisesti: Herra kuulee, kuin minä häntä rukoilen.
verses.king_james: But know that the Lord hath set apart him that is godly for himself: the Lord will hear when I call unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Irascimini, et nolite peccare ;  quæ dicitis in cordibus vestris, in cubilibus vestris compungimini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רִגְז֗וּ וְֽאַל־תֶּ֫חֱטָ֥אוּ אִמְר֣וּ בִ֭לְבַבְכֶם עַֽל־מִשְׁכַּבְכֶ֗ם וְדֹ֣מּוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Be ye angry, and sin not: the things you say in your hearts, be sorry for them upon your beds.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 4:5) Jos te vihastutte, niin älkäät syntiä tehkö: puhukaat sydämissänne, teidän vuoteissanne, ja odottakaat, Sela!
verses.king_james: Stand in awe, and sin not: commune with your own heart upon your bed, and be still. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacrificate sacrificium justitiæ, et sperate in Domino.  Multi dicunt : Quis ostendit nobis bona ?
verses.douay_rheims: Offer up the sacrifice of justice, and trust in the Lord: many say, Who sheweth us good things?
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 4:6) Uhratkaat vanhurskauden uhria, ja toivokaat Herran päälle.
verses.king_james: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness, and put your trust in the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Signatum est super nos lumen vultus tui, Domine :  dedisti lætitiam in corde meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַבִּ֥ים אֹמְרִים֮ מִֽי־יַרְאֵ֢נ֫וּ ט֥וֹב נְֽסָה־עָ֭לֵינוּ א֨וֹר פָּנֶ֬יךָ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The light of thy countenance, O Lord, is signed upon us: thou hast given gladness in my heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 4:7) Moni sanoo: kuka osoittais meille hyvää? Mutta nosta sinä Herra meidän päällemme sinun kasvois paiste.
verses.king_james: There be many that say, Who will shew us any good? Lord, lift thou up the light of thy countenance upon us.

verses.latin_vulgate: A fructu frumenti, vini, et olei sui, multiplicati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָתַ֣תָּה שִׂמְחָ֣ה בְלִבִּ֑י מֵעֵ֬ת דְּגָנָ֖ם וְתִירוֹשָׁ֣ם רָֽבּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: By the fruit of their corn, their wine, and oil, they are multiplied:
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 4:8) Sinä ilahutat minun sydämeni; ehkä muilla on jyviä ja viinaa kyllä.
verses.king_james: Thou hast put gladness in my heart, more than in the time that their corn and their wine increased.

verses.latin_vulgate: In pace in idipsum dormiam, et requiescam ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּשָׁל֣וֹם יַחְדָּו֮ אֶשְׁכְּבָ֢ה וְאִ֫ישָׁ֥ן כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה יְהֹוָ֣ה לְבָדָ֑ד לָ֝בֶ֗טַח תּוֹשִׁיבֵֽנִי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: In peace in the self same I will sleep, and I will rest:
verses.finnish_biblia: (H 4:9) Minä makaan ja lepään juuri rauhassa; sillä sinä Herra yksinäs autat minua turvassa asumaan.
verses.king_james: I will both lay me down in peace, and sleep: for thou, Lord, only makest me dwell in safety.
